CREATE TABLE test_array (id UInt32, values Array(Int32));
SELECT values[1] FROM test_array WHERE id = 1;
SELECT values[2] FROM test_array WHERE id = 2;
SELECT arrayElement(values, 3) FROM test_array WHERE id = 2;
SELECT values[4] FROM test_array WHERE id = 2;
SELECT arrayElement(values, 4) FROM test_array WHERE id = 2;
CREATE TABLE test_nested (id UInt32, arr_values Array(Array(Int32)));
SELECT arrayElement(arr_values, 1)[2] FROM test_nested WHERE id = 1;
CREATE TABLE test_join (id UInt32, value Array(Int32));
SELECT t1.id, arrayElement(t2.value, 2) FROM test_array AS t1 JOIN test_join AS t2 ON t1.id = t2.id;
SELECT count(*) FROM test_array WHERE arrayElement(values, 1) > 15;
SELECT id FROM test_array WHERE arrayElement(values, 3) IS NULL;
SELECT arrayElement(values, -1) FROM test_array WHERE id = 1;
